title: Zebby's Incident Report
text:
## Incident Report

**Filed by:** Zebby, black cat

**Time:** {number} o'clock

**Location:** The {place} near the {object}

**Event:** Human attempted to {verb} without offering {food} first.

**Witnesses:**
- Matilda ({adjective})
- Violet ({adjective})

**Response:** Zebby {past-tense verb} under the couch, then {past-tense verb} the offender's {body part}.

**Damage:** One {object} knocked over, zero regrets.

**Corrective action:** Schedule {adjective} play sessions; stop buying {adjective} toys.

**Status:** Closed until next {adjective} snack.
